non_activation_rules: Static prototype artifacts do not imply customer-facing readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply live runtime readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply execution readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply trading automation readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply broker/Binance connectivity.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply credential handling readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply scheduler or notification dispatcher readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not imply production deployment readiness.
Static prototype artifacts do not mutate trading facts, portfolio state, account state, cash state, or execution ledger state.
Static prototype artifacts may only be used as planning, fixture, static shell, and validation evidence.
required_conditions: Only static planning, static fixture prototype, and local read-only prototype levels are allowed.
Trading facts, portfolio state, execution ledger state, cash state, broker connection, and Binance connection remain unchanged.
